candidate_check.description: Windows Server 2025 Application event log size must be configured to 32768 KB or greater.

check_content_excerpt:
If the system is configured to write events directly to an audit server, this is not applicable.

If the following registry value does not exist or is not configured as specified, this is a finding:

Registry Hive: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE
Registry Path: \SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\EventLog\Application\

Value Name: MaxSize

Type: REG_DWORD
Value: 0x00008000 (32768) (or greater)
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Event Log Service >> Application >> Specify the maximum log file size (KB) to "Enabled" with a "Maximum Log Size (KB)" of "32768" or greater.
title: Windows Server 2025 Application event log size must be configured to 32768 KB or greater.
